setup: 1 Lv 1.0 Infantry attacker Colonel Mueller with Gatot visible at level 1 versus 1 FC1 T1 Rookie Infantry defender Alpaca with the Infantry hero slot vacant.

turn_inference.cadence: King's Bestowal triggers each time Gatot's Infantry attacks
assumptions: For these controlled Gatot Infantry tests, Martin treats King's Bestowal's trigger count as the exact battle-round count.

stats_capture.notes: All three troop classes and all four stat rows were visible in the report's Stat Bonuses panel.

hero_skills.name: Golden Guard
hero_skills.effect: Gatot commands his troops with imperial guard tactics, increasing his Infantry's Defense by 6%.

hero_skills.name: King's Bestowal
hero_skills.effect: The great kings blesses Gatot's Infantry, granting Infantry a Shield with protection equal to Attack*6% each time they attack, for 1 turn.

stats_capture.notes: All three troop classes and all four stat rows were visible in the report's Stat Bonuses panel. Right side is FC1 T1 Infantry, not normal T1.

notes: Source location: WOS_BattleReports_Gatot_Mueller_Alpaca.pdf, PDF page 2, report 4 from left.
Left side attacker is displayed as [Rfj]Colonel M?ller; normalized to Colonel Mueller for filenames.
Alpaca's right-side Infantry is FC1 T1 Rookie Infantry, not normal T1 Infantry.
FC1 T1 Infantry base stats from WOS_Troop_Stats_FC1-FC10_T1-T10.json are Attack 1, Defense 4, Lethality 1, Health 6.
Battle overview shows Alpaca/right side survives with 1 survivor and no losses or injured troops.
Gatot Golden Guard triggered 1 time; King's Bestowal triggered 147 times; visible third Gatot skill triggered 1 time.
Skill kills are displayed as dashes and recorded as zero.
Alpaca's defender Infantry hero slot is shown as vacant.

manual_overrides: Right-side defender normalized to Alpaca per Martin's instruction.
Right-side troop tier manually tagged as FC1 T1 per Martin's instruction and troop stat reference.
Gatot skill names/descriptions use Martin's previously supplied fixed Gatot reference.

_stat_base_reference: STAT BASE REFERENCE (added 2026-07-12): Alpaca deploys Fire-Crystal (FC) infantry. Use the FC-adjusted base troop stats in docs/TroopStats/WOS_Troop_Stats_FC1-FC10_T1-T10.json, NOT a normal-T1 assumption. For Infantry T1, FC level changes only Defense (FC1 D=4 -> FC10 D=7); Attack/Lethality/Health stay 1/1/6. Confirm Alpaca's actual FC level (reports label it FC1) and use that row for any calibration where Alpaca's troops are the target being killed (its D/H then matter).
